title: Tom and Jerry Gokko
titleNative: とむとじぇりーごっこ
synopsis: To celebrate "Cheese Day," (November 11 in Japan), Cartoon Network Japan debuted an anime spin on Tom and Jerry that combines the fast-paced humor of the original with a cute, "pop" worldview. The pair are joined by the diaper-wearing Tuffy Mouse, another recurring character from the classic cartoon. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Reborn as a Cat
synopsis: Ji Miaomiao, a young woman just starting her career, is betrayed by a friend and left with a mountain of debt. While fleeing from ruthless debt collectors, she accidentally falls from a building. On the brink of death, a mysterious figure transforms her into a cat. By a twist of fate, she ends up being adopted—by none other than her own boss, Lu Chengze. Thus begins her strange and magical 100-day life... as a cat. (Source: Bilibili)

title: Lian Qi Shiwan Nian
synonyms: One Hundred Thousand Years of Qi Refining
ข้าก็แค่ฝึกวิชาหนึ่งแสนปี
synopsis: One hundred thousand years ago, he was the founding disciple of the Tianlan Sect, his master ascended to the top, and he was refining Qi. Ninety thousand years ago, his martial nephew ascended, and he was refining Qi. Fifty thousand years ago, the old dog who was the gatekeeper of Tianlanzong also ascended, and he was still refining Qi. Thirty thousand years ago, the old tree at the foot of the mountain also became a demon, and he was still refining Qi before he could pass the catastrophe. Ten thousand years ago, Zhang Wuji, the 9872nd generation disciple of Tianlanzong, also ascended, and Xu Yang silently refined Qi. He retreated for 10,000 years, and finally, he broke through the 9999th floor of the Qi refining period! Ten thousand years later, he broke through and came out!

title: Animation × Paralympic: Who Is Your Hero?
titleRomaji: ANI x PARA: Anata no Hero wa Dare desu ka
titleEnglish: Animation × Paralympic: Who Is Your Hero?
titleNative: アニ×パラ〜あなたのヒーローは誰ですか〜
synopsis: “ANIMATION × PARALYMPIC: Who Is Your Hero?” is a special series featuring fictional Paralympic athletes depicted in world-renowned Japanese animation. The project aims to introduce new Paralympic sports heroes through attractive characters and stories that will be created by the collaboration of famous comic creators and animation film directors. The series will increase the number of featured sports by 2020. An episode animated by Kyoto Animation was scheduled to be broadcast in August 2019, but was later announced to be cancelled after it was determined production could not be completed in time for the 2020 Paralympic Games due to a tragic arson attack on the studio.

title: Ryoutei no Aji
synopsis: Short stories capturing the bittersweet and tender moments of everyday family life, made for Marukome Co., Ltd. a miso soup paste manufacturer. List of commercials: • #1: Mother and Son (たっぷりお徳 母と息子篇) • #2: Working away from Home (即席生みそ汁 単身赴任篇) • #3: A Midnight Snack (カップみそ汁 夜食篇) • #4: Coming to Tokyo (液みそ 上京篇) • #5: Being a mother (無添加 母になれば篇) • #6: Miso Soup (お徳用あおさ ミソスープ篇) • #7: Home Sick Together (米麦合わせ ふたりでおやすみ篇) • #8: Together Forever (液みそ いつまでも一緒に篇) • #9: Look After Yourself (フリーズドライ 顆粒みそ 気をつけてね篇) • #10: Memories of Summer Vacation (夏休みの思い出篇) • #11: My Whimsical Little Boy (息⼦にはかなわない篇) • #12: Home for the Holidays (帰省篇) • #13: Cooking Is Super Cool (料理ってすごいね篇)

title: B.King
synopsis: This is the tale of a well-known cartoonist who rose to fame thanks to his comic book.B.K. But after several years, he ran out of ideas and had to rely solely on abandoning his characters in order to draw attention. He was drawn into the realm of B. King as Wang Xiaoming after receiving an enigmatic phone call one day. As a result, Wang Xiaoming, who now possesses the ideas of the "creator," sets out on a fantastical journey that might be summed up as "God's shortcut, one step to heaven." (Source: Bilibili TV)

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

tags.name: Reincarnation

title: Komekami! Girls
synopsis: This is the story of the seven-sister unit "Komekami! Girls," children of the rice deity, born from the tradition: "In a single grain of rice, seven gods reside." When their mother (the deity of rice, or the rice-god queen) was called back in haste to the celestial realm and no longer able to return to the earthly realm they search for her traces using Usa City (Oita Prefecture) as their base, and teleport to Hachiman shrines throughout Kyushu island. As they solve local problems, they learn about food, take part in cooking battles, and grow.

title: mofusand
synopsis: Shark Meow is an orange tabby kitty who wears a shark suit. A little clumsy and always taking things at their own cozy pace, but every day with their best kitty friends — and the rescued baby kitty, Little Meow — is filled with unexpected little mishaps and sweet adventures. A sunny warm spot in the park, the sparkle of the sea, steam rising from freshly roasted sweet potatoes, the fluttery feeling of the first snowfall… These small everyday moments fill their world with warmth and delight. You can’t help but smile and think, “So true!” A soft and snuggly kitty anime that brings joy to everyday moments. (Source: QTORY Channel)

title: Prince Mackaroo
synopsis: In the Heian era, around 1000 years ago, a young boy of noble family named Ojarumaru is bored with his life of privilege. Meanwhile, three demons steal the power-stick of Enma, king of demons, and then lose it. Ojarumaru finds it, and uses it to transport himself to the present time. Here, he is befriended by a young boy named Kazuma, and becomes a member of his family. As time goes on, Ojarumaru makes many new friends, while dodging the comedic efforts of the three demons, Akane, Kisuke, and Aobee, as they try to recover the stick. (Source: Anime News Network)
